LanguageData.CoS_CombatMedicShield.label: Combat Medic Shield
LanguageData.CoS_CombatMedicShield.description: A plasteel alloy combat shield designed for medical staff to carry during battle. Tough and bulky, it will straight out reduce incoming damage in a percentage and can be used as a bash weapon.
